_comment: Override and supplement summaries from the installed attune-help package. Entries here win over summaries_by_path.json. Add entries here to fix retrieval gaps without touching attune-help.
references/tool-doc-audit.md: Find and audit stale documentation for outdated content, broken links, and drift from source code — flags docs that no longer match the codebase.
references/tool-doc-orchestrator.md: Orchestrates and coordinates documentation workflows across the project — manages the documentation pipeline including doc generation, audit, and updates.
references/tool-deep-review.md: End-to-end code review before merging a PR — comprehensive multi-pass analysis covering security, quality, tests, and correctness across all changed files.
concepts/tool-bug-predict.md: Predicts production bugs by spotting risky code changes before merging — identifies which files are most likely to break, finds potential runtime errors before deployment, and catches eval injection, bare exceptions, incomplete code paths, and high-defect-rate functions via pattern matching and cyclomatic complexity.
references/tool-bug-predict.md: Spots risky code changes before merging — identifies files most likely to break, finds potential runtime errors and deployment risks, predicts bugs via cyclomatic complexity, change-frequency hotspots, bare-except patterns, and unfinished code paths.
concepts/tool-fix-test.md: Automatically diagnoses and fixes failing tests and CI pipeline failures by classifying root causes — import errors, mock mismatches, assertion drift, type errors, fixture issues, environment problems — and applies targeted fixes with retry logic up to 3 attempts.
quickstarts/skill-fix-test.md: Auto-diagnoses and repairs failing tests and CI pipeline failures by classifying root causes — import errors, assertion drift, mock mismatches, type errors, fixture issues — and applies targeted fixes with up to three re-run attempts.
concepts/tool-release-prep.md: Preflight checklist verifying health, security, changelog, dependencies, and version consistency to produce a go/no-go assessment before publishing to PyPI or tagging a release.
references/tool-release-prep.md: Pre-release go/no-go assessment covering health checks, security audit, changelog verification, dependency vulnerabilities, and release readiness before publishing to PyPI or tagging a release.
references/tool-analyze-batch.md: Submit tasks to the Anthropic Batch API for 50% cost savings — processes bulk analysis requests asynchronously, best for non-urgent large-scale jobs.
references/tool-analyze-image.md: Analyze screenshots, diagrams, and UI mockups using Claude's vision capabilities — supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, and WebP.
references/tool-attune-get-level.md: Get the current attune interaction level (1–5): Reactive, Guided, Proactive, Anticipatory, or Systems.
references/tool-attune-set-level.md: Set the attune interaction level (1–5) for the current session to control how proactively attune guides the user.
references/tool-auth-recommend.md: Get an authentication mode recommendation based on file size and complexity — suggests optimal auth strategy for the current file.
references/tool-auth-status.md: Check current authentication strategy, subscription tier, and default auth mode configuration.
references/tool-code-review.md: Run a comprehensive code quality review — analyzes style, bugs, complexity, and maintainability and returns prioritized improvement suggestions.
references/tool-context-get.md: Read a named session context value previously stored with context-set.
references/tool-context-set.md: Write a named value into session context for retrieval later in the same session.
references/tool-dependency-check.md: Audit project dependencies for known vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and license risks — returns a risk-ranked report with remediation recommendations.
references/tool-health-check.md: Run a full project health check covering environment, dependencies, configuration, and code quality — returns a score, grade, and prioritized recommendations.
references/tool-memory-forget.md: Delete a stored memory entry from attune-ai's persistent memory by key.
references/tool-memory-retrieve.md: Fetch a stored memory entry by key or pattern ID from attune-ai's persistent memory.
references/tool-memory-search.md: Search attune-ai persistent memory for entries matching a natural-language query.
references/tool-memory-store.md: Persist structured knowledge, patterns, or cross-agent coordination data in attune-ai's long-term memory.
references/tool-performance-audit.md: Profile and audit code for performance bottlenecks, memory leaks, and inefficient patterns — returns optimization recommendations ranked by impact.
references/tool-research-synthesis.md: Synthesize insights from multiple source documents into a unified summary — useful for consolidating scattered notes, specs, or research into a single answer.
references/tool-secure-release.md: Run the full secure release pipeline: security audit, code review, and final go/no-go decision before tagging or publishing.
references/tool-simplify-code.md: Identify complex code hotspots and generate targeted refactoring suggestions to reduce cognitive load and improve readability.
references/tool-telemetry-stats.md: Retrieve workflow performance statistics: cost savings, prompt cache hit rates, latency, and usage breakdowns.
references/tool-test-audit.md: Run a deep test coverage audit — identifies gaps, prioritizes which modules need tests most, then generates and verifies them.
references/tool-test-gen-parallel.md: Batch-generate tests for 10–50 modules simultaneously using multi-tier LLM orchestration for maximum throughput.
references/tool-test-generation.md: Generate pytest unit tests for a module or file — can batch across multiple modules in parallel.
concepts/audience-adaptation.md: Renders the same template source as three channel-specific formats: Claude Code inline conversation, marketplace static docs, and CLI Rich terminal output.
concepts/cross-linking.md: Deterministic relationships between 498 templates — Error links to Warning, Skill links to Tool, FAQ links to Error — enabling navigation between related docs.
concepts/feedback-loop.md: User ratings (good/bad) accumulate into a template confidence score that influences ranking and surfaces higher-quality results over time.
concepts/meta-orchestration.md: Six patterns for composing workflows into pipelines: Sequential, Parallel, Debate, Teaching, Refinement, and Adaptive orchestration.
concepts/progressive-depth.md: Templates adapt verbosity based on repeat access — compact on first view, normal on second, full detail on third — reducing overload for users who ask follow-up questions.
concepts/socratic-discovery.md: Core UX principle: guide users through scoping questions before executing — understand goal, narrow scope, confirm choices, then run the workflow.
concepts/sync-paradigm.md: Six-step pattern every doc generator follows: Discover, Parse, Transform, Validate, Output, Verify — ensures generated docs stay in sync with source code.
concepts/tier-routing.md: Automatically selects the right Claude model (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus) based on task complexity — keeps costs low for simple tasks and escalates to premium for complex analysis.
concepts/workflow-chain-prediction.md: Suggests follow-up workflows based on learned transition patterns after a workflow completes — e.g. code-review → security-audit → test-gen.
quickstarts/install.md: Install attune-ai from PyPI using pip — covers package installation, optional extras, and first-run verification.
quickstarts/install-plugin.md: Install and configure the attune-ai Claude Code plugin to enable attune skills inside Claude Code.
quickstarts/browse-help.md: Browse and search attune-ai help templates for errors, tips, troubleshooting, and tool documentation.
quickstarts/check-health.md: Run the environment health check to diagnose configuration problems, missing dependencies, and setup issues.
quickstarts/check-costs.md: View API cost history and usage statistics for attune-ai workflow runs — shows cost savings and cache hit rates.
quickstarts/generate-tests.md: Auto-generate pytest unit tests for uncovered code modules — analyzes coverage gaps and writes targeted tests.
quickstarts/run-code-review.md: Run AI-powered code quality analysis to get prioritized suggestions for bugs, style, anti-patterns, and maintainability improvements.
troubleshooting/ci-tests-timeout.md: Fix GitHub Actions test matrix timeouts — diagnoses slow tests, platform-specific hangs, and timeout configuration issues.
troubleshooting/gpg-signing-fails.md: Fix GPG signing failures in VSCode and Claude Code — resolves 'gpg failed to sign the data' errors in non-interactive terminals.
troubleshooting/import-error-attune.md: Fix ModuleNotFoundError for attune submodules — diagnoses missing extras, incorrect install paths, and virtual environment issues.
troubleshooting/mcp-server-not-respondin: Fix MCP server unavailable errors — diagnoses connection failures when Claude Code skills don't trigger or show no response.
troubleshooting/plugin-not-found.md: Fix missing Claude Code plugin skills — resolves cases where /attune and other skill commands show no matches in Claude Code.
troubleshooting/pre-commit-infinite-loop: Fix pre-commit hooks that loop repeatedly — resolves black/ruff auto-fix conflicts that cause commits to fail even after re-staging.
troubleshooting/workflow-not-running.md: Fix workflows that produce no output or authentication errors when running attune workflow run commands.
